summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new features: Progress Tracker, CSV Export, CSV Import. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. All features working correctly.
test_credentials: No authentication required - app is open access
seed_data_creation: Progress tracker seeded with 5 thesis chapters via /api/progress/seed endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features tested and working: 1) Progress Tracker - displays 5 chapters with progress bars, expandable sections with subtasks and status controls, checkbox toggling updates progress. 2) CSV Export - Statistics page shows Export CSV button after calculation, downloads CSV with ANOVA/DMRT results. 3) CSV Import - Research Data page has Import CSV button, accepts CSV format (Row1=parameter, Row2=unit, Row3=headers, Row4+=data).

progress_tracker.details: GET /api/progress returns 5 seeded chapters. PUT /api/progress/{id} updates status, pages, subtasks. UI displays chapters with progress bars, expandable sections, status dropdown, pages input, subtask checkboxes. All interactions working correctly.

csv_export.details: POST /api/statistics/export-csv returns CSV file with correct headers and content. Includes raw data, descriptive stats, ANOVA results, and DMRT results when significant. Export CSV button appears after calculation in Statistics page.

csv_import.details: POST /api/research-data/import-csv accepts multipart form data with CSV file. Correctly parses parameter name, unit, and data values. Validates minimum rows and numeric data. Import CSV button present in Research Data page.

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/research-data/import-csv - Import research data from CSV
